hero.title: AI Core Solutions
hero.subtitle: Driving Growth Through AI-Powered Development & Solutions

timeline.title: Elite Team | Scalable Impact | Leading-Edge Technology
timeline.description: By deeply integrating AI into our operational and production workflows, we deliver the execution power of a 30-plus person agency. From strategic consulting and conceptualization to product development and AI optimization, we are committed to delivering exceptional results with unmatched speed and absolute precision.

period1.title: Born from Passion
period1.description: Two AI software engineers, fueled by a deep passion for technology, founded AI Core Solutions. With a vision to bring cutting-edge AI solutions to Vietnamese businesses.
period1.milestone: First Project: An e-commerce website integrated with AI recommendation systems.

period2.title: Team Expansion
period2.description: Our early successes enabled us to grow the team by adding three key members: a Solution Architect, a Frontend Developer, and a UI/UX Designer.
period2.milestone: Complete eight big projects following this expansion.

period3.title: The AI Pivot
period3.description: Since 2023, with the advent of GPT, we've recognized that AI is no longer merely about core integration—it's poised to be a true game-changer. We've delved into research and seamlessly applied AI throughout our development processes to significantly boost productivity.

period4.title: Pioneering Innovation
period4.description: We continue to expand and innovate relentlessly, diving deep into research and integrating the latest AI technologies—such as GPT, Computer Vision, and AutoML—directly into our clients' products for transformative results.
period4.milestone: Reached 100+ projects, top 10 AI Solutions company

about.title: Professional Team
about.description: A team of passionate technology and AI experts, fully committed to turning your ideas into reality. We blend deep expertise with Agile methodologies and AI-assisted development to deliver the most optimized, high-impact solutions.

testimonials.title: What Customers Say About Us
testimonials.description: Customer satisfaction is the measure of our success

lan.name: Phạm Thị Lan
lan.content: The smart manufacturing management system has improved our operational efficiency by 35%. The support team is very enthusiastic and highly responsive.

tuan.name: Nguyễn Minh Tuấn
tuan.content: AI Core Solution has helped us build an intelligent real estate management platform powered by AI. They not only have a deep understanding of technology but also a profound grasp of our business.

huong.name: Trần Thu Hương
huong.content: The AI Core Solution team is very professional and dedicated. Our website and CRM system have been AI-optimized, helping to increase the conversion rate by 40%.

anh.name: Võ Đức Anh
anh.content: Great partnership! They’re not only excellent at coding but also provide valuable insights on UX and business strategy. The solution architecture is highly scalable.

chau.name: Đặng Minh Châu
chau.content: The AI-integrated e-commerce recommendation solution has doubled our online sales. This is the most reliable technology partner we have ever worked with.

nam.name: Lê Hoàng Nam
nam.content: From idea to complete product in just 3 months. They applied AI to the development process, significantly saving time and costs.
